BUSINESS Our Company Emerald is a leading business-to-business (B2B) event organizer principally in the United States, with expanding operations in the U.K. and international markets. Leveraging our shows as key market-driven platforms, we integrate live events, media content, industry insights, digital tools, data-focused solutions and e-commerce platforms into three complementary business lines Connections, Content and Commerce.
